prompt: Explain how a golden test corpus works when each case records stdout, stderr, and exit code as three separate files on disk.
Explain why a database index on a low-cardinality column often fails to help a query.
Explain how exponential backoff with jitter works in a retrying API client.
Explain why invalidation is the hard part of a read-through cache.
A developer believes rebasing a shared branch is equivalent to merging it. Correct that belief and explain what actually differs.
Should a four-person team move its three services into a monorepo? Give me your recommendation.
